commands.notes: Compiled reconciliation test entrypoint and imported modules for execution.
All reconciliation scenarios and parser/scanner coverage pass (6 tests).

verification.regression_notes: Added unit tests for all requested drift detection rules plus completion marker parsing and output mapping/JSON validation.

handoff.summary: Implemented state reconciliation by comparing workpack.state.json, outputs/*.json, and 99_status.md completion markers; added scanner/parser helpers and drift severity reporting.
next_steps: Wire reconciliation into parser/indexer and UI diagnostics when those modules are integrated.
Run full project-level verification after in-progress parser/graph changes stabilize.
known_issues: Per user direction, verification was scoped to reconciliation modules and tests; unrelated in-progress project files were left untouched.

notes: State reconciliation implementation recognizes protocol completion markers (✅/🟢 variants) and reports overall health as healthy, drifted, or inconsistent.
